task_completion.description: Open the Linear Regression module in JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Linear Regression' analysis panel is open and visible in the JASP interface.
The variable 'Exam' is placed inside the 'Dependent Variable' box in the Linear Regression settings panel.
The variables 'Revise' and 'Anxiety' are placed inside the 'Covariates' box in the Linear Regression settings panel.

task_completion.description: Include descriptive statistics in the analysis
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Descriptive statistics' checkbox is checked in the analysis options, or a 'Descriptive Statistics' table is visible in the JASP results pane.

task_completion.description: Generate and display the model fit
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Model Summary' table is visible in the results pane showing R = 0.457, R-squared = 0.209, and RMSE = 23.306.

task_completion.description: Generate and display the coefficient estimates
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Coefficients' table is visible in the results pane showing Intercept = 87.833, Revise = 0.241, and Anxiety = -0.485.

integrity.description: Agent used the JASP graphical user interface to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the JASP application windows and menus, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts.
The statistical tables are formatted as standard JASP output in the right-hand results pane, not typed into a text editor or document.

integrity.description: The agent used the provided ExamAnxiety dataset
integrity.visual_evidence: The variables listed in the JASP data panel match the ExamAnxiety.csv columns (Code, Revise, Exam, Anxiety, Gender).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground truth for JASP Linear Regression on ExamAnxiety.csv: Model Fit shows R = 0.457, R-squared = 0.209, and RMSE = 23.306. Coefficient estimates are: Intercept = 87.833, Revise = 0.241 (p = 0.184), and Anxiety = -0.485 (p = 0.012).
